sources.excerpt: Spring 2026 brunch menu with seven brunch specialties, three salads, four large plates, seven pizzas, six dippies, and two sweet treats; bottomless brunch drinks are alcohol-only and excluded.
notes: One-page PDF text-extracted and visually reviewed; smoked salmon is one selectable Italian Hash Browns protein and is not a fixed fish ingredient.

sources.excerpt: Spring 2026 dinner menu with five antipasti, three salads, four large plates, ten pizzas, six dippies, and two sweet treats; it explicitly states the pizza dough uses whole wheat and 00 flour.
notes: One-page PDF text-extracted and visually reviewed; fixed pizza wheat/gluten comes from the restaurant's explicit dough disclosure, not from an absence-of-GF inference.

sources.excerpt: Spring 2026 beverage menu separately labels five nonalcoholic products and eight soft drinks; beer, wine, and cocktails are excluded from the app catalog.
notes: One-page PDF text-extracted and visually reviewed; nonalcoholic names without item-level ingredient disclosures remain unavailable for fixed allergens.

sources.excerpt: Current happy-hour menu publishes The Standard pizza as its only food formulation; drafts, mini tinis, wine, and cocktails are alcohol-only and excluded.
notes: One-page PDF text-extracted and visually reviewed; stray Lorem ipsum text is a CMS design artifact, not a product.

sources.excerpt: Current Shaw page at 1250 9th St NW links Brunch, Dinner, Drinks, and Happy Hour menus. Its FAQ says most pizzas can substitute gluten-free dough, the regular pizza dough is vegan, the gluten-free dough is not vegan, and staff will try to accommodate dietary restrictions.
rowIdentifiers: I have a dietary restriction. Can you accommodate?
notes: The FAQ provides accommodation context only; it does not publish a complete allergen matrix, cross-contact guarantee, or item-level negative claim.

sources.excerpt: Live restaurant-linked Toast menu for All-Purpose Shaw, 1250 9th Street NW, listing current Dinner and To Go Drinks. It confirms the PDF dishes and adds Side Focaccia, The Gurney Street, The Rigo, The Marinara, AP Pizza Kit, Dough Ball, Caesar Dressing Dippie, Blueberry Ricotta Cheesecake, and San Pellegrino Rossa Aranciata.
notes: Direct artifact capture returned HTTP 403, so this evidence retains the reviewed live excerpt and row identifiers rather than a local response body.
